# Media Domain Index

This directory contains both long-lived media standards and historical rollout material.

## Active Guidance

- `MEDIA_BACKEND_MODULE_DESIGN_2026-03-18.md`: backend structure and boundary reference.
- `MEDIA_API_CONTRACT_DESIGN_2026-03-18.md`: current media API and response-shaping reference.
- `MEDIA_DATABASE_SCHEMA_DESIGN_2026-03-18.md`: current schema and persistence reference.
- `MEDIA_TEST_AND_ACCEPTANCE_CHECKLIST_2026-03-18.md`: active validation checklist when media behavior changes.

## Historical Rollout Material

- `historical/MEDIA_TASK_PLAN_2026-03-18.md`
- `historical/MEDIA_RELEASE_RUNBOOK_2026-03-18.md`
- `historical/MEDIA_WEAPP_MIGRATION_PLAYBOOK_2026-03-18.md`
- `historical/MEDIA_WEB_MIGRATION_PLAYBOOK_2026-03-18.md`
- `historical/MEDIA_LEGACY_UPLOADS_REMOVAL_MIGRATION_2026-03-24.md`
- `historical/MEDIA_OSS_CDN_FINAL_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN_2026-03-18.md`

Use historical files only when a task depends on migration history, one-time cutover assumptions, or previous rollout sequencing. Routine media changes should start from the active guidance set above.
